name: Ionic
description: Ionic — Cross-platform mobile and desktop app framework using web technologies with native device API access.

seo.title: Ionic — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Ionic: Ionic — Cross-platform mobile and desktop app framework using web technologies with native device API access.

when_to_use: Cross-platform mobile apps using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Building iOS and Android apps from a single React codebase
Capacitor-based native API access in web-built mobile apps
Hybrid app development with desktop, web, and mobile targets
Migration of web apps to mobile with minimal code change

pros: Web skills ship to iOS and Android
cons: UX can feel webby if not tuned
review.verdict: A pragmatic cross-platform framework for web teams, not the pick for performance-critical native apps.
review.best_for: Web teams shipping cross-platform mobile and desktop apps fast
review.not_for: High-performance or graphics-heavy apps needing native UX

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
